name: claude-blog
description: Claude Code blog skill suite: 30 sub-skills, 5 agents, 5-gate v1.9.0 Blog Delivery Contract, dual-optimized for Google rankings and AI citations. Active development at AI-Marketing-Hub/claude-blog (AI Marketing Hub Pro community); public releases ship here.
readme_summary: The claude-blog repository provides a comprehensive suite of AI-powered tools for writing, optimizing, and auditing blog content. It aims to produce high-quality articles that are dual-optimized for search engine rankings and AI citation platforms, ensuring content meets specific quality standards through a multi-stage delivery contract.
key_features: AI-powered blog content creation, optimization, and auditing
Dual optimization for Google rankings (E-E-A-T) and AI citations
v1.9.0 5-gate Blog Delivery Contract for quality assurance
30 sub-skills and 5 agents for comprehensive blog workflow
Multiple content templates and on-demand references
Open-source (MIT license) and community-supported versions available
primary_use_case: To automate and enhance the production of high-quality, SEO-optimized blog content using AI, ensuring it meets stringent quality and platform-specific requirements.
cover_image_prompt: A master craftsman, embodying the 'claude-blog' system, meticulously assembling a polished, glowing book from various raw materials like digital text fragments, SEO optimization gears, and citation markers. The craftsman is working at a sophisticated workbench with subtle UI elements displaying content scores and optimization metrics. In the background, a stylized representation of a search engine results page and an AI overview panel show the book being highly ranked and cited. The scene uses a clean, modern aesthetic with a color palette of blues, oranges, and whites, rendered in a 3D isometric illustration style with clear, defined lines and a focus on the transformation process.

name: storyboarder
description: ✏️ Storyboarder makes it easy to visualize a story as fast you can draw stick figures.
readme_summary: Storyboarder is a JavaScript application designed to help creators visualize stories quickly through simple drawing tools. It allows users to create storyboards from scratch or by importing Fountain screenplays, facilitating rapid iteration and sharing of visual ideas without the complexity of professional animation software.
primary_use_case: Rapid visualization and iteration of story ideas through digital storyboarding.
cover_image_prompt: A whimsical, slightly messy artist's desk bathed in warm light. In the center, a digital tablet displays a series of simple stick-figure drawings transitioning between frames, representing a story in motion. Beside the tablet, a few scattered paper sketches and a Fountain pen lie as if momentarily set aside. Subtle glowing lines connect the digital frames, symbolizing the flow of ideas. The repository name 'Storyboarder' is subtly integrated into a small, stylized UI element on the tablet screen. The overall style is a 3D isometric illustration with a clean, friendly aesthetic, emphasizing ease of use and creative flow.

name: PhantomBot
description: PhantomBot is an actively developed open source interactive Twitch bot with a vibrant community that provides entertainment and moderation for your channel, allowing you to focus on what matters the most to you - your game and your viewers.
readme_summary: PhantomBot is an open-source, Java-powered Twitch bot designed to enhance live streams with interactive features and robust moderation. It offers a built-in web panel for easy management, a customizable point system, games, raffles, and integration with popular streaming services.
primary_use_case: To provide streamers with an interactive and customizable Twitch chat bot for channel moderation, viewer engagement, and entertainment.
cover_image_prompt: A friendly, anthropomorphic robot character, embodying 'PhantomBot', is standing at a vibrant Twitch chat console. The robot is simultaneously juggling multiple streams of colorful data (representing viewer messages, commands, and alerts) and directing them into different channels: one channel leads to a 'Moderation Shield' that filters out negative comments, another to a 'Game Zone' where fun mini-games are being played, and a third to a 'Community Rewards' area with glowing points and raffle tickets. Subtle UI elements and glowing digital particles surround the robot, hinting at its software nature. The scene is bright, engaging, and set in a stylized, futuristic streaming studio. The art style should be a 3D isometric illustration with clean lines and a playful, inviting color palette.

name: GLM-OCR
readme_summary: GLM-OCR is a powerful multimodal OCR model designed for complex document understanding. It leverages a GLM-V architecture with advanced training techniques like Multi-Token Prediction and reinforcement learning to achieve state-of-the-art accuracy and efficiency. The model is optimized for real-world scenarios and offers easy integration through an open-source SDK.
key_features: State-of-the-Art Performance on document understanding benchmarks
Optimized for Real-World Scenarios (complex tables, code-heavy documents, seals)
Efficient Inference with 0.9B parameters, supporting vLLM, SGLang, and Ollama
Easy to Use with open-sourced SDK, simple installation, and one-line invocation
primary_use_case: Accurate and fast optical character recognition (OCR) for complex documents, including tables, formulas, and information extraction.
cover_image_prompt: A meticulous librarian meticulously scanning ancient, complex scrolls filled with intricate text, tables, and diagrams. As the scanner beam passes over each scroll, the chaotic symbols transform into clear, organized digital text and structured data on a nearby holographic display. The librarian wears a futuristic visor, and subtle lines of code flow around the scanner. The background is a softly lit, organized archive. The overall mood is one of precision and transformation, highlighting the repository's ability to bring order to complex visual information. Style: 3D isometric illustration with clean lines and a futuristic, yet accessible aesthetic.

name: zot
description: zot - A scale-out production-ready vendor-neutral OCI-native container image/artifact registry (purely based on OCI Distribution Specification)
readme_summary: zot is a production-ready, vendor-neutral OCI-native container image registry. It strictly adheres to the OCI Image Format and Distribution Specification, ensuring compatibility and interoperability without proprietary extensions.
key_features: Purely based on OCI Distribution Specification
Stores images in OCI image format
primary_use_case: To provide a compliant and robust registry for storing and serving OCI container images and artifacts.
cover_image_prompt: A highly organized, futuristic library where books are represented as sleek, standardized OCI containers. A diligent librarian, embodying the 'zot' registry, is meticulously cataloging and retrieving these containers from vast, interconnected shelves. Each container has a clear, universal OCI logo. In the background, subtle digital streams of data flow between the shelves and a central cataloging terminal, hinting at the distribution specification. The overall scene is clean, modern, and efficient, rendered in a 3D isometric illustration style with a cool, professional color palette, emphasizing order and universal compatibility.
